evaluation.summary: No significant difference was found in digit transition probabilities between primes and control numbers in Base-10, with a high p-value (0.97) indicating the null hypothesis cannot be rejected.
next_directions: Investigate digit transition patterns in Base-2 and Base-16 where prime structure may impose stronger constraints
Analyze consecutive digit pair frequencies specifically among the allowed last digits (1,3,7,9) to control for terminal digit bias
Examine longer n-gram digit sequences rather than single transitions to detect higher-order structural patterns
